Query.SQL: SELECT W.WARRANT_ID AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER", W.WARRANT_NUMBER AS "C.DISPLAY_NUMBER", 'HOME WARRANT' AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_TYPE", W.DEFENDANT1 AS "C.DEFENDANT1", W.DEFENDANT2 AS "C.DEFENDANT2", W.ISSUED_BY AS "C.ISSUING_COURT", W.EXECUTED_BY AS "C.EXECUTING_COURT", W.CURRENTLY_OWNED_BY AS "C.OWNING_COURT" FROM WARRANTS W, CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO WHERE W.CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND W.CO_NUMBER = CO.CO_NUMBER AND CO.CO_TYPE = 'CAEO' UNION SELECT CO.CO_NUMBER AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER", CO.CO_NUMBER AS "C.DISPLAY_NUMBER", 'CO' AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_TYPE", CO.DEBTOR_NAME AS "C.DEFENDANT1", NULL AS "C.DEFENDANT2", NULL AS "C.ISSUING_COURT", NULL AS "C.EXECUTING_COURT", CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AS "C.OWNING_COURT" FROM CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO WHERE CO.CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber}

SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*), 0, 'Y', 'N') AS "C.OUTSTANDING" FROM WARRANT_RETURNS WR, RETURN_CODES RC WHERE ${C.ENFORCEMENT_TYPE} = 'HOME WARRANT' AND WR.WARRANT_ID = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND WR.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' AND RC.RETURN_CODE = WR.RETURN_CODE AND RC.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = WR.RETURN_CODE_COURT_CODE AND RC.RETURN_TYPE = 'F' UNION SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*), 0, 'Y', 'N') AS "C.OUTSTANDING" FROM CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO WHERE ${C.ENFORCEMENT_TYPE} = 'CO' AND CO.CO_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND (CO.CO_STATUS IS NULL OR (CO.CO_STATUS != 'LIVE' AND CO.CO_STATUS != 'DEBTR PAYNG'))
